meaning: (Department of)Health and Human Services(美国)卫生和福利部
examples: What are the legal ways that HHS can address this issue?
States must submit their exchange plans to HHS next year.
I was contracted with HHS for technical modeling assistance.
At the end of the summer, HHS will decide whether to go into production.
Europe, the leading cancer experts in the US, and the rest of HHS (meaning CMS) disagreed.
